subject: A robed human wizard standing at an outdoor stone lectern, conjuring a swirling spiral of blue arcane energy in their raised hand
description: A bearded wizard in flowing blue and gold robes stands behind a low stone balustrade or lectern, body angled to the viewer's right, one hand raised to summon a tightly coiled spiral of glowing pale-blue arcane energy. The figure's robe drapes are layered and classical, suggesting a Greek-inspired academic. Behind them, soft lights glow against a deeper blue dusk sky, and the silhouette of distant architecture and foliage suggests an open-air academy or teaching grove. The palette is dominated by cool blues with warm gold and ochre accents on the robe trim and skin tones. Light rims the figure from the magical spiral, giving the scene a contemplative, instructional mood.
foreground: robed wizard at a stone lectern conjuring a blue magical spiral
background: twilight sky over an open-air classical academy with distant warm lights and foliage
emotion: calm focus, instructive concentration; gaze fixed on the conjured spell as if demonstrating
